content.en:
The Great Ancestor of the Extreme Yang retreated, and on the way back, he was naturally seen by the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea.

"The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor has left? Could it be that he still can't touch the origin of the Ruins Stone Tower, so go back and figure out a way?"

Xinghai Great Ancestor thought to himself.

He never thought that the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor would be defeated by Ye Tian, so he retreated.

Soon, the Great Ancestor of the Extreme Yang came out of the ruins stone tower.

......

Jiuyang Sea.

After the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor returned, he immediately told the situation on the ninth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower to the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform of the Jiuyang Sea, the Eastern Wilderness Great Ancestor!

"Mahayana immeasurable!"

The Great Ancestor of the Eastern Wilderness frowned slightly.

Being able to practice into a Mahayana immeasurable body means that the other party's origin is not simple, even if it is not the great ancestor of Taichen Palace, it is also from the forces outside the realm that surpass the Jiuyang Sea.

It may even be the disciples of some strong people like Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, otherwise they would not be able to contact the Mahayana immeasurable body at all, and they would not be able to cultivate the Mahayana immeasurable body.

"Eastern Wilderness Great Ancestor, now I have to find a way to go to the ninth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower, in terms of strength, I should be weaker than the other party, but the weakness is not too much, if Jiuyang Sea gives more hole cards, I still have hope to defeat the other party!"

However, the Eastern Wilderness Great Ancestor shook his head: "Give up, the other party's origin is not simple, and if you want to defeat the other party, Jiuyang Hai can't do it at present." It's just a ruin, if it's lost, it's lost, and in these long years, there are not one or two ruins that we Jiuyanghai haven't snatched, so there's no need to be too persistent!"

"Yes!"

The Great Ancestor of the Extreme Yang replied.

In this way, Jiuyanghai gave up fighting for this relic stone tower.

......

The ninth floor of the Ruined Stone Tower.

The Xinghai Great Ancestor and the others were still persevering, and after spending a while, they finally arrived at the location of the origin of the Ruins Stone Tower.

Then.

The Great Ancestor of the Star Sea sensed Ye Tian's existence.

"Sure enough, he's right here!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor said secretly.

And Ye Tian also sensed the existence of the Xinghai Great Ancestor, and couldn't help frowning slightly.

"It's really troublesome, there are a few more Great Ancestors!"

Ye Tian shook his head secretly, and immediately pointed and performed a truncated finger.

Rumble!!!

The terrifying truncation finger spanned a certain distance and pointed directly at the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea.

The Xinghai Great Ancestor's face changed, and he instinctively exerted all his defenses, and the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain was sacrificed, turning into an invisible defensive wall, and punched it away.

This punch gathered the strength of the whole body of the Star Sea Great Ancestor, and it also contained the power of the immeasurable will lake, so this was a blow that surpassed his past peak.

However, in the face of Ye Tian's truncated finger, the strength of the Star Sea Great Ancestor was still not enough.

Tear !!!

Layers of defense were pierced, and even a defensive treasure on the Star Sea Great Ancestor's body, which was second only to the Black God Armor Stone Defense, was still cracked.

And the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea himself was even more beaten to pieces, and drops of immeasurable blood spilled into the void, impregnating this area.

Several other Great Ancestors saw the situation of the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea, and quickly retreated a section of the area one by one.

"Impossible!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor was incredulous.

Even the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor couldn't have injured him like this with a single blow, let alone a high-level immeasurable lifeform that had only recently broken through to the third stage.

"He's definitely a desperate blow, and he can't use it anymore!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor comforted himself.

So, he broke out all the means to kill the past, and one after another hole cards were revealed, making his breath stronger and stronger, and his injuries were recovering quickly.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian was also annoyed, stopped refining the origin of the Ruined Stone Tower, and turned to attack the Xinghai Great Ancestor with all his might.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea fought here, and from the very beginning, Ye Tian completely crushed the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea.

No matter how many hole cards the Xinghai Great Ancestor has, it doesn't make any sense.

Collapse!!!

The Great Ancestor of the Star Sea was beaten to the point that his body was constantly shattered, every drop of immeasurable blood was annihilated, and every immeasurable bone was shattered and turned into powder.

Soon, Xinghai Great Ancestor's injuries were quite serious, and he couldn't do it if he wanted to recover quickly.

At this time, the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea also calmed down, he knew that he was not Ye Tian's opponent, what if he fell here?

Moreover, when the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms could not enter, the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Xuanqi Pavilion could not rescue him.

"Run!

The Great Ancestor of the Star Sea used a treasure to escape quickly and escaped.

And Ye Tian didn't chase after him, he knew that he couldn't kill the Star Sea Ancestor in the Ruined Stone Tower, once he left this area, it would be impossible to do it, otherwise he would be suppressed by the Ruined Stone Tower.

That is, this place is suppressed by the forces of the two realms, so that the rules of the ruin stone tower are also suppressed, and only this level of battle will not attract the attention of the ruin stone tower.

Besides, it was impossible for him to give up the Stone Tower of Refining Relic!

With the escape of the Star Sea Great Ancestor, several other Great Ancestors were stunned.

Although their strength is not weaker than that of the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea, there are even one or two Great Ancestors whose strength is still above the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea, and they also belong to the top six existences of the Infinite Blood List.

However, after they saw Ye Tian's combat strength, they knew that they were not opponents, and they had no hope of reluctantly confronting Ye Tian unless they went together.

"Let's go!"

They gave up, knowing that they had little hope of going to the Ruins Stone Tower, plus they saw that Ye Tian had cultivated the Mahayana Immeasurable Body, and their identity was definitely not simple.

After a combination of many factors, they chose to leave.

These Great Ancestors left, and Ye Tian was at ease refining the Ruins Stone Tower.

......

Genki Pavilion.

The Xinghai Great Ancestor dragged his injured body back, and went to meet the Xuanxin Great Ancestor for the first time.

"Xinghai Great Ancestor, are you injured?"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor was a little puzzled.

Xinghai Great Ancestor nodded slightly: "I was injured by the mysterious Great Ancestor of the Ruins Stone Tower, the other party's strength is even more powerful than the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor, and he has already cultivated the Mahayana Immeasurable Body, and the body is incredibly powerful, no less than my physical fitness." He is definitely the Great Ancestor who has undergone extreme tempering at the Infinite Bone Stage, and he has also mastered the complete Infinite Extreme Domain Technique!"

"Mahayana Immeasurable Body, Infinite Bone Stage Extreme Tempering, this is not a Great Ancestor that ordinary forces can cultivate, could it be Taichen Palace?"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor also thought of Taichen Palace.

Even if it is not Taichen Palace, it is also a force outside the realm that is no less than Taichen Palace, and such a force is not easy to provoke.

If the other party can send Ye Tian, it means that there is a passage to enter the Xuanqi Territory, who dares to provoke it?

"Xuanxin Great Ancestor, what should I do now?"

Xinghai Great Ancestor asked.

Xuanxin Great Ancestor sighed: "Give up, according to my understanding, Jiuyang Sea should also give up, you can't beat that mysterious Great Ancestor, give up too!"

Immediately, he changed his voice again, "However, even if that mysterious ancestor captures the ruins stone tower, he may not be able to defend it. If the forces behind him don't send strong people to garrison them, there are many forces that want to recapture the Ruins Stone Tower, and there are also forces that don't understand the situation, they may make a move against that mysterious Great Ancestor, and then there will be a good show!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor nodded slightly, and immediately went back to heal his injuries.

Gradually, Ye Tian occupied the origin of the Ruined Stone Tower, and the news that he was refining the Ruined Stone Tower spread.

Suddenly, some of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of some forces were hiding around the ruins stone tower, as if they were planning something.

After a period of time passed, Ye Tian was not far from the Preliminary Refining Ruins Stone Tower.
